captureRecovery.description: Report lock/unlock/session transitions so the Electron Viewer can reconnect cleanly.

secureDesktopAwareness.description: Detect active Windows session and expose lock/login transition status where Windows permits.

privilegedInput.description: Prepared future signed helper path for privileged input integration where OS policy permits it.

driverIntegration.description: Future signed display/capture driver integration. Not included in the current Electron build.

agentWatchdog.description: Monitor the visible Electron Agent and ask the installed watchdog task to relaunch it if it crashes.

sessionHelper.description: Launch AssistaneSessionHelper.exe inside the active user session for per-session helper work.

backgroundStatusHeartbeat.description: Write local bridge status heartbeat to ProgramData for Agent diagnostics.
